name: Documents
description: Gets all the in-memory documents in a collection.
property_value: This is a read only property whose value is a Documents.

name: Mass
description: Gets and sets the mass of the model in database units.
property_value: This is a read/write property whose value is a Double.

name: Open
description: Property that returns whether this document is currently open. If False, the document has only been initialized and calling methods or properties on the document could cause it to open.
property_value: This is a read only property whose value is a Boolean.

name: ComponentDefinition
description: Gets the primary ComponentDefinition that resides in this file (housing the BRep and its geometric Feature Constraints).
property_value: This is a read only property whose value is a PartComponentDefinition.

name: MassProperties
property_value: This is a read only property whose value is a MassProperties.

name: Volume
description: Gets and sets the volume of the model in database units.
property_value: This is a read/write property whose value is a Double.
